label: Foundations
description: Files every repo gets. Locked on.

label: Documentation
description: Optional docs scaffolding (ARCHITECTURE, CONTRIBUTING, ADRs, CHANGELOG).

label: GitHub remote
description: Create the repo on GitHub, apply labels, apply baseline branch protection.

label: Agent workflow
description: Capabilities that AI agents use during PR work. The check map is on by default; optional automation can be added per repo.

label: PR contract bundle
description: Optional standalone PR title/body/branch workflows. The default repo-required-gate already enforces the merge contract.

label: Language CI
description: Default single required gate plus legacy standalone CI callers. New repos should keep repo-required-gate and set its stack to node, python, or minimal.

label: Copilot / Pro tier (v0.4)
description: Copilot enablement and Actions secrets. Hidden until v0.4.
